parameters.subsql:
WITH combined_sheets AS (
  -- Объединяем данные из двух таблиц отчётов о пользователях
  SELECT user_id, date_join, invitelinks, date_left, username, name
  FROM sheets_report_75329
  UNION ALL
  SELECT user_id, date_join, invitelinks, date_left, username, name
  FROM sheets_report_75605
),
combined_leads AS (
  -- Объединяем данные из двух таблиц по лидам с унификацией полей и учётом разных имен полей
  SELECT leads_id, creation_date_time, date_qual, booking_event, qual, price, deal_amount, password, priority, utmsource
  FROM perfomance_all_leads
  WHERE password IS NOT NULL -- Фильтруем строки с неопределёнными паролями
  UNION ALL
  SELECT lead_id AS leads_id,
         creation_date AS creation_date_time,
         qualification_date AS date_qual,
         is_booked AS booking_event,
         is_qualified AS qual,
         budget_usd AS price,
         NULL AS deal_amount, -- нет аналога в msc_
         password,
         priority,
         utm_source AS utmsource -- Приведение имени поля к общему виду
  FROM msc_perfomance_all_leads
  WHERE password IS NOT NULL -- Фильтруем строки с неопределёнными паролями
)

SELECT lf.contacts_id,
       COUNT(p.leads_id) AS leads, -- Количество лидов на контакт
       MAX(ct.telegram_id) AS telegram_id,
       MAX(uj.date_join) AS date_join,
       MAX(p.leads_id) AS leads_id,
       MAX(p.creation_date_time) AS creation_date_time,
       MAX(p.date_qual) AS date_qual,
       SUM(p.qual) AS sum_qual, -- Сумма квалифицированных лидов
       SUM(p.booking_event) AS booking_event,
       MAX(p.priority) AS priority, -- Максимальный приоритет среди лидов
       MAX(p.price) AS budget,
       MAX(p.password) AS password, -- Пароль для сверки доступности
       MIN(cs.name) AS name,
       MIN(cs.phone) AS phone,
       MAX(z.date) AS zakupki_date,
       MAX(z.channel_name) AS channel_name,
       MAX(z.channel_link) AS channel_link,
       MAX(z.cost) AS cost,
       MAX(uj.invitelinks) AS invitelinks,
       MAX(tc.category) AS category,
       MAX(ct.geo) AS geo
  FROM combined_leads p
  LEFT JOIN amocrm_leads_facts lf ON lf.leads_id = p.leads_id
  LEFT JOIN amocrm_contacts cs ON cs.id = lf.contacts_id
  LEFT JOIN sheets_report_75606 ct ON CAST(ct.contacts_id AS INTEGER) = lf.contacts_id
  LEFT JOIN combined_sheets uj ON uj.user_id = ct.telegram_id
  LEFT JOIN zakupki z ON LOWER(TRIM(
    COALESCE(
        CASE 
            WHEN ct.geo = 'ОАЭ' THEN z.invitelinks_uae
            WHEN ct.geo = 'Москва' THEN z.invitelinks_msc
        END,
        CASE 
            WHEN ct.geo = 'Москва' THEN z.invitelinks_uae
            WHEN ct.geo = 'ОАЭ' THEN z.invitelinks_msc
        END,
        z.invitelinks
    )
  )) = LOWER(TRIM(uj.invitelinks))
  LEFT JOIN webhook_zakupki_channels_info tc ON tc.channel_url = z.channel_link
  WHERE p.utmsource = 'zakupka' -- Фильтрация по источнику
    AND p.qual = 1
    AND cs.phone IS NOT NULL
    AND uj.date_join IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY lf.contacts_id
  ORDER BY MAX(p.creation_date_time) DESC

result_schema.title: channels
result_schema.formula:
IF [channel_name] IS NULL 
    AND ICONTAINS([invitelinks], '_cjqczhl') 
        THEN 'Instagram'
ELSEIF [channel_name] IS NULL 
    AND ICONTAINS([invitelinks], 'sdxdhwz4') 
        THEN 'СысоевFM в Дубае'
ELSE
    [channel_name]
END
result_schema.guid_formula:
IF [channel_name] IS NULL 
    AND ICONTAINS([invitelinks], '_cjqczhl') 
        THEN 'Instagram'
ELSEIF [channel_name] IS NULL 
    AND ICONTAINS([invitelinks], 'sdxdhwz4') 
        THEN 'СысоевFM в Дубае'
ELSE
    [channel_name]
END
